chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1482 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 22-09-2025 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< None present for the Petitioner nor any intimation received. This Petition is pending on the file of this Court since, 2022 and was lastly fixed in Court on 22-02-2023. Thereafter no concrete efforts were taken either by the Petitioner or his Counsel to pursue the matter diligently. The conduct of the Petitioner and his Counsel prima facie suggests either the purpose of filing instant Petition has been served or he has lost interest in pursuing this Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
